rooms.title: Rooms & Suites
rooms.subtitle: Find the space that suits you

superior.name: Superior Sea View
superior.shortDesc: A refined retreat with panoramic ocean views, designed for discerning travelers seeking comfort and elegance.
superior.description: Our Superior Sea View rooms offer a sophisticated escape with floor-to-ceiling windows framing the azure waters of Ha Long Bay. Each room features premium bedding, a spacious marble bathroom with rain shower, and a private balcony where you can watch the sunrise paint the limestone karsts in golden light. The minimalist design lets nature take center stage.

deluxe.name: Deluxe Bay View
deluxe.shortDesc: Spacious luxury with sweeping bay views, premium amenities, and an atmosphere of refined tranquility.
deluxe.description: The Deluxe Bay View room elevates your stay with expanded living space and unobstructed views of Ha Long Bay's iconic limestone formations. Featuring a king-size bed with the finest linens, a deep soaking bathtub, and a generous balcony, this room is your private sanctuary. Enjoy complimentary evening turndown service and premium coffee amenities.

premium.name: Premium Ocean Suite
premium.shortDesc: A distinguished suite with separate living area, ocean panorama, and exclusive butler service.
premium.description: The Premium Ocean Suite offers an elevated experience with a separate living area, wraparound ocean views, and personalized butler service. Wake up to endless blue horizons, unwind in the oversized marble bathroom, and enjoy exclusive access to our Executive Lounge. Every detail has been curated for guests who appreciate the art of luxury living.

suite.name: Executive Suite
suite.shortDesc: Expansive suite with panoramic views, private dining area, and bespoke concierge services.
suite.description: Our Executive Suite is a masterpiece of space and style, offering panoramic views from every window, a private dining area for intimate gatherings, and a dedicated concierge team. The suite features hand-selected art, a luxurious bedroom with walk-in closet, and a spa-inspired bathroom. Includes complimentary spa treatments and airport transfers.

presidential.name: Presidential Suite
presidential.shortDesc: The pinnacle of luxury — a private residence with pool, full kitchen, and white-glove service.
presidential.description: The Presidential Suite represents the ultimate expression of luxury at Lullaby Sky Villa. This expansive private residence features a plunge pool, fully equipped kitchen, formal dining room, and a master bedroom with panoramic views across Ha Long Bay. Enjoy round-the-clock butler service, private airport transfers, and a dedicated spa therapist on call.

highlightsList.seaView: Stunning sea view from private balcony
highlightsList.bayView: Sweeping views of Ha Long Bay

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Discover the beauty of Lullaby Sky Villa

about.title: About Lullaby
about.subtitle: A story of luxury, nature, and hospitality

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Born from a vision to create a sanctuary where modern luxury meets the timeless beauty of Ha Long Bay, Lullaby Sky Villa opened its doors in 2020. Every detail — from the architecture that mirrors the bay's limestone pillars to the service philosophy rooted in Vietnamese warmth — was designed to create an unforgettable experience.
story.p2: We believe luxury isn't about excess; it's about intention. Each space in our hotel is thoughtfully crafted to bring guests closer to nature while providing every modern comfort. The result is a place where you can truly disconnect from the world and reconnect with what matters.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We pursue perfection in every detail, from the thread count of our linens to the warmth of our welcome.

hospitality.title: Heartfelt Hospitality
hospitality.description: True luxury is personal. Our team anticipates your needs before you even know them yourself.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We are stewards of Ha Long Bay's natural heritage, committed to preserving its beauty for generations.

attractions.title: Ha Long Bay Attractions
attractions.subtitle: A natural wonder awaits at your doorstep
attractions.intro: Ha Long Bay, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, is home to nearly 2,000 limestone karsts and islands rising from emerald waters. As a guest of Lullaby Sky Villa, you have privileged access to explore this natural masterpiece through curated experiences.

sungSot.title: Sung Sot Cave
sungSot.description: One of the largest and most beautiful caves in Ha Long Bay, Sung Sot (Surprise Cave) features spectacular stalactites and stalagmites in vast chambers. The cave sits on Bo Hon Island and offers breathtaking views from its entrance.

tiTop.title: Ti Top Island
tiTop.description: Named after a Soviet cosmonaut, Ti Top Island features a crescent-shaped beach with powdery white sand. Climb the 427 steps to the summit for panoramic views of the bay that will take your breath away.

cruise.title: Luxury Bay Cruise
cruise.description: Glide through the emerald waters aboard a traditional wooden junk or modern luxury yacht. Our curated cruise experiences include sunset cocktails, fresh seafood dining, and overnight stays among the karsts.

kayaking.title: Kayaking Adventures
kayaking.description: Paddle through hidden lagoons, secluded caves, and floating fishing villages. Kayaking in Ha Long Bay offers an intimate connection with nature that larger vessels simply cannot provide.

fishing.title: Floating Villages
fishing.description: Visit the traditional floating fishing villages where families have lived on the water for generations. Learn about local fishing techniques and enjoy the freshest seafood directly from the source.

sunset.title: Sunset at the Bay
sunset.description: Nothing compares to watching the sun dip behind the limestone pillars as the sky transforms into a canvas of gold, pink, and purple. Best enjoyed from our rooftop terrace with a cocktail in hand.

cta.title: Experience Ha Long Bay with Us
cta.subtitle: Our concierge team can arrange bespoke tours and experiences tailored to your interests
